name: Affiliate Earnings — Google Sheets to Supabase

nodes.name: Upsert Vince → Supabase
nodes.notes:
Calls Supabase REST API directly.
Set SUPABASE_URL and SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY in n8n Variables (Settings > Variables)
or replace the expressions with hardcoded values.
USE SERVICE ROLE KEY (not anon key) for write access.

nodes.name: Upsert Difiano → Supabase
nodes.notes:
Calls Supabase REST API directly.
Set SUPABASE_URL and SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY in n8n Variables (Settings > Variables)
or replace the expressions with hardcoded values.
USE SERVICE ROLE KEY (not anon key) for write access.

meta.description: Migrates affiliate earnings data from two Google Sheets (Vince + Difiano) into the Supabase affiliate_earnings table. Reads all monthly tabs, cleans and transforms data, then upserts into Supabase via the REST API.
meta.notes:
SETUP REQUIRED:
1. In n8n go to Settings > Variables and add:
   - SUPABASE_URL = https://xxxx.supabase.co
   - SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY = your service role key (NOT anon key)
   OR: open each HTTP Request node and hardcode the URL and key directly.
2. Set your Google Sheets OAuth2 credential on the two Read sheet nodes.
3. Run schema.sql in Supabase SQL Editor first.
4. Click 'Execute Workflow' — processes all months for both affiliates.
5. Re-run anytime to sync updates (upsert is idempotent).
